svg.text: 9:16 · 1080×1920 · captions: BIZDRIVE Blue Word-Sweep — every word in the group is solid white from the moment the group appears; the currently-spoken word pops to BLUE (#2EA8FF) with a small scale bump, then settles back to white. No coloured box, no particles, no backing pill — bare bold text with a heavy shadow for readability over video. Centered over the seam.
